name: DominionIdsCmnPrctXfrm

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP2_TMP_DominionIdsCmnPrctXfrm; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP3_TMP_DominionIdsCmnPrctXfrm; WITH cte1 AS (SELECT Provider_Identifier,Provider_Address_Identifier,Term_Date,First_Name,Last_Name,Middle_Name,Suffix,National_Provider_Identifer,Provider_Tax_Identifier,Cultural_Capability_Name FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP1_TMP_DominionIdsCmnPrctXfrm), cte2 AS (SELECT Provider_Identifier + Provider_Address_Identifier AS SvCmnPrctId,1 AS SvLangSeqNo,CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(Term_Date) = '' THEN '' ELSE SUBSTRING(dbo.trim_default(Term_Date),1,4) + '-' + SUBSTRING(dbo.trim_default(Term_Date),6,2) + '-' + SUBSTRING(dbo.trim_default(Term_Date),9,2) END AS svTermDt,First_Name,Last_Name,Middle_Name,Suffix,National_Provider_Identifer,Provider_Tax_Identifier,Cultural_Capability_Name FROM cte1), cte3 AS (SELECT (cte2.SvCmnPrctId + ';' + CAST(cte2.SvLangSeqNo AS VARCHAR(10)) + ';' + '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}') AS PRI_NAT_KEY_STRING,'@{pipeline().parameters.RunIDTimeStamp}' AS FIRST_RECYC_TS,0 AS CMN_PRCT_SK,cte2.SvCmnPrctId AS CMN_PRCT_ID,'@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}' AS SRC_SYS_CD,0 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,0 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCdSk} AS SRC_SYS_CD_SK,'1' AS CMN_PRCT_GNDR_CD,CASE WHEN cte2.svTermDt < SUBSTRING('@{pipeline().parameters.RunIDTimeStamp}',1,10) THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS ACTV_IN,'1753-01-01' AS BRTH_DT,'1753-01-01' AS INIT_CRDTL_DT,'1753-01-01' AS LAST_CRDTL_DT,'1753-01-01' AS NEXT_CRDTL_DT,UPPER(dbo.trim_default(cte2.First_Name)) AS FIRST_NM,UPPER(dbo.trim_default(cte2.Last_Name)) AS LAST_NM,UPPER(dbo.trim_default(cte2.Middle_Name)) AS MIDINIT,UPPER(dbo.trim_default(cte2.Suffix)) AS CMN_PRCT_TTL,cte2.National_Provider_Identifer AS NTNL_PROV_ID,cte2.Provider_Tax_Identifier AS SSN,UPPER(dbo.trim_default(cte2.Cultural_Capability_Name)) AS CULT_CPBLTY_NM FROM cte2), cte4 AS (SELECT @{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCdSk} AS SRC_SYS_CD_SK,cte2.SvCmnPrctId AS CMN_PRCT_ID FROM cte2) SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP2_TMP_DominionIdsCmnPrctXfrm FROM cte3; SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP3_TMP_DominionIdsCmnPrctXfrm FROM cte4;

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2005 - 2012 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 

JOB NAME:  DominionIdsCmnPrctXfrm

DESCRIPTION:    Pulls data from DOMINION PROVIDERS, and REFTABLE  to a extract file for the IDS
  
CALLED BY : DominionProvExtrSeq   

PROCESSING:  Output file is created with a temp. name.  File renamed in job control.

OUTPUTS:   Dataset name is created in the job control ( FinalOutFile Parameter )

MODIFICATIONS:

Developer                          Date                    Project/Altiris #                     Change Description                                                       Development Project               Code Reviewer                      Date Reviewed
----------------------------------      -------------------      -----------------------------------           ---------------------------------------------------------                                 ----------------------------------              ---------------------------------               -------------------------
   
Vamsi Aripaka                 01/30/2024              US 609430                           Initial Programming                                                            IntegrateDev1                    Jeyaprasanna                          2024-02-02

Annotations:
JobName: DominionIdsCmnPrctXfrm

Strip field function and Tranformation rules are applied on the data Extracted from Facets.
Transformed Data will land into a Dataset for Primary Keying job.

Data is partitioned on Natural Key Columns.
